name: blueprints
description: Design-doc skills that support implementation: Lean PRD (vision + scope), ERD (entity-relationship diagrams, 3 levels), domain-models (one DOMAIN.md per Bounded Context with Aggregate structure, invariants per Aggregate, and external-context collaboration), policy-book (business policies with POL-XXXX IDs and ADR-style lifecycle). All skills share a naming philosophy (no 'make-' prefix = ongoing maintenance) and store per-project paths in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md rather than separate config files.
